name: How long do I have to file after a forklift hit me at work?
description: Utah: 1 year for workers' comp, 180 days notice to employer. Don't wait.

mainEntity.name: How long do I have to file after a forklift hit me at work?

acceptedAnswer.text: Utah: 1 year for workers' comp, 180 days notice to employer. Don't wait.
acceptedAnswer.description: In Utah, file workers' comp within 1 year of the accident; third-party suits have a 4-year statute.[3] Context: Delays risk claim denial as evidence fades. Key factors: Date of injury or discovery starts clock; employer notice within 180 days required. Practical guidance: File immediately via employer or Utah Labor Commission; preserve forklift and footage. Act fast to protect benefits.
